name: Route annotations: REST handlers (note, starred, tags)
description: Expose the route-annotations-schema columns over HTTP so the web UI can read and write them. Reads are available over session-or-JWT (so share-link/download flows keep working), writes are session-only (device JWTs have no business editing user annotations). Matches the project's existing pattern: handler lives in internal/api/route.go (or a sibling file), auth is funneled through checkDongleAccess, errors use the {error, code} envelope.
acceptance_criteria: PUT /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/note accepts {"note": string} (max 4000 chars), 400 on over-length, 204 on success; session auth only
PUT /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/starred accepts {"starred": bool}, 204 on success; session auth only

PUT /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/tags accepts {"tags": [string,...]} and replaces the set atomically (uses ReplaceRouteTags). Tags are lowercased and trimmed on the server before insert; duplicates after normalization are silently deduped; returns 400 if any tag fails the 1-32 char constraint; session auth only
GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/tags returns {"tags": [string,...]} listing distinct tags across all of a device's routes for the tag autocomplete in the UI; session-or-JWT
Existing GET /v1/route/:dongle_id and GET /v1/route/:dongle_id/:route_name responses now include note, starred, and tags fields on each route (via the updated ListRoutesByDeviceWithCounts query)
All five new endpoints funnel authorization through checkDongleAccess(c, dongleID) and reject mismatched dongles with 403

Handler tests in internal/api/ cover: set note (happy), note over 4000 chars returns 400, toggle starred, replace tags with duplicates (dedupe), replace tags with invalid entry (400), session-vs-JWT auth boundary, cross-device access returns 403
go test ./internal/api/... and go vet ./... pass; routes are registered in cmd/server/routes.go (not main.go)
notes: Five endpoints landed: PUT note/starred/tags (session-only), GET tags and GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/tags (session-or-JWT). All funnel through checkDongleAccess; writes ride v1RoutesSessionOnly alongside share-create and config-mutation. routeListItem/routeDetailResponse now surface note/starred/tags so GET /v1/route/:dongle_id and GET /v1/route/:dongle_id/:route_name include them. Tags normalized (lowercase + trim) and deduped server-side; 1-32 char validation enforced before db write. Handler tests cover happy paths, over-length note, dedupe, invalid tag lengths, cross-device 403, and session-only middleware boundary.
